name: tokenlens
description: Local token usage and cache analytics for Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, and Gemini CLI. No cloud sync, no telemetry, and no outbound requests.

viewsWelcome.contents:
Open the local TokenLens dashboard for Claude Code, Copilot, and Gemini CLI usage.

[$(graph) Open Dashboard](command:tokenLens.openPanel)

tokenLens.autoSyncOnStartup.description: Scan and sync logs when VS Code starts.

tokenLens.liveTracking.description: Watch log files and update the dashboard in near-real-time as you work.

tokenLens.claudeCodeHome.description: Override path to the Claude Code home directory (defaults to ~/.claude, or $CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR).

tokenLens.geminiCliHome.description: Override path to the Gemini CLI home directory (defaults to ~/.gemini, or $GEMINI_CLI_HOME).

tokenLens.cacheWriteTtl.description: Cache-write pricing tier for Claude Code USD estimates (5m = 1.25x input, 1h = 2x input).

tokenLens.showEstimatedCost.description: Show API-equivalent cost estimates for Claude Code and Gemini CLI. When off, those sources show tokens only (no USD), since you may pay a flat subscription (or nothing on free tiers) rather than per token.

tokenLens.budget.dailyUSD.description: Daily spend threshold in USD (combined, including Claude Code estimate). 0 disables the alert.

tokenLens.budget.weeklyUSD.description: Weekly spend threshold in USD. 0 disables the alert.

tokenLens.debugLogging.description: Verbose logging to the TokenLens output channel.

scripts.dev:vscode: npm run build:vsix && npm run install:vscode
